summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 candidate PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned directly. Security-sensitive PRs are quarantined with route_security; already closed non-security PR #63057 is kept closed; remaining open non-security PRs are kept open or routed to maintainer review based on hydrated preflight evidence.

actions.reason: Open Android release automation touches secret-bearing release workflow/security-boundary handling, so it is out of ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup scope.
No mutation is valid for an already closed PR in plan mode.
The remaining decision is product/architecture maintainer review of the proposed handoff protocol boundary, not dedupe cleanup.
The PR touches tool registration, auth-provider behavior, and workspace/sandbox policy, so it should remain quarantined to central security handling even though it is already closed.
This is a narrow independent test PR, not a duplicate/low-signal closeout candidate.
Base image and runtime container changes cross security/availability boundary concerns and are out of ProjectClownfish cleanup scope.
The PR changes authorized group command/tool update delivery behavior across channel security boundaries, so it is quarantined rather than handled as backlog cleanup.
The PR remains related to a partially addressed gateway send behavior gap, but it is not merge-ready and should not be closed as duplicate in this shard.
This is a real independent PR with actionable review work remaining, not a duplicate or low-signal closeout candidate.
Synchronous delegation/session tooling changes touch session-state, transcript handling, and security-boundary concerns, so the item is quarantined to central security handling.

needs_human: #63789 needs maintainer product/architecture review for whether the Phase 1 handoff protocol docs should be accepted, revised, or superseded by adjacent A2A work.
